blocked_reasons.required_resolution: Author valid package values or derive them with persistent provenance; do not rely on PhysX auto-compute fallbacks.
blocked_reasons.summary: Every scoped rigid body requires explicit finite positive mass/inertia, finite COM, a normalizable principal-axes quaternion, and complete provenance.
